title: From Excel to AI decision support
description: Learn the core AI workflow: frame a business question, inspect signal quality, and translate model output into actions a team can execute.
valueProposition: You will leave this lesson able to explain how AI turns raw tables into trustworthy recommendations.
concepts: Problem framing: what question are we solving?
Feature quality: which columns carry predictive signal?
Interpretability: how to explain outputs to non-technical stakeholders
outcomes: Define a clear AI question from spreadsheet data
Identify measure vs dimension fields and why that matters
Convert KPI patterns into concrete business actions
steps: State the business question before running analysis
Load sample data and inspect schema + field roles
Run AI analysis and compare trend vs segment behavior
Generate explanation and evaluate whether actions are justified
aiPrompt: Create a compact training dashboard for this dataset: 3 to 5 KPIs and 2 or 3 charts (mix of bar and line if a date or period column exists). Use only real column names. Title the dashboard "Lesson: Sales patterns".

title: AI reasoning for KPI diagnostics
description: Go beyond dashboard reading: diagnose why KPIs moved, test segment hypotheses, and choose next actions with AI-backed evidence.
valueProposition: You will learn to challenge AI output, validate assumptions, and build confidence in decision quality.
outcomes: Run structured KPI diagnostics instead of passive chart viewing
Identify high-impact segments from category-level performance
Write an action plan grounded in measurable evidence
steps: Form a hypothesis about what drives KPI variance
Run AI and inspect segment-level breakdowns
Validate whether the evidence supports your hypothesis
Generate an action brief with priorities and expected impact
aiPrompt: Build a 2-tab DashboardSpec: Tab "Overview" with KPIs for revenue and units plus a bar chart by region; Tab "Products" with a bar chart by product and a table of the raw rows (limit columns to fit). Use only schema field names.
